# Zimbabwe Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Zimbabwe's administrative hierarchy:
> 10 provinces, 91 districts, 1,961 wards.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total provinces: 10
- Total districts: 91
- Total wards: 1,961
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-28
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All wards (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-ward.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Province

- [Bulawayo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bulawayo-zw10/) — 1 districts, 29 wards
- [Harare](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/harare-zw19/) — 4 districts, 78 wards
- [Manicaland](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/manicaland-zw11/) — 10 districts, 260 wards
- [Mashonaland Central](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mashonaland-central-zw12/) — 10 districts, 232 wards
- [Mashonaland East](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mashonaland-east-zw13/) — 11 districts, 229 wards
- [Mashonaland West](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mashonaland-west-zw14/) — 13 districts, 231 wards
- [Masvingo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/masvingo-zw18/) — 9 districts, 243 wards
- [Matabeleland North](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/matabeleland-north-zw15/) — 9 districts, 193 wards
- [Matabeleland South](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/matabeleland-south-zw16/) — 10 districts, 170 wards
- [Midlands](https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/midlands-zw17/) — 14 districts, 296 wards

## Per-Province Full Data

- [Bulawayo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bulawayo-zw10.txt)
- [Harare](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/harare-zw19.txt)
- [Manicaland](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/manicaland-zw11.txt)
- [Mashonaland Central](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mashonaland-central-zw12.txt)
- [Mashonaland East](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mashonaland-east-zw13.txt)
- [Mashonaland West](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mashonaland-west-zw14.txt)
- [Masvingo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/masvingo-zw18.txt)
- [Matabeleland North](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/matabeleland-north-zw15.txt)
- [Matabeleland South](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/matabeleland-south-zw16.txt)
- [Midlands](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/midlands-zw17.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (province), 2 (district), 3 (ward)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Zimbabwe Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/zimbabwe-administrative-divisions
